---
title: "Understanding Your Team: Thinking and Working Styles, Working Agreements"
author: "Interpersonal Communication"
description: "This session will unpack what makes you and your colleagues tick and the implications for how your team works together"
categories:
    - <span style='color:#0096c7'>Embrace Vulnerability</span>
    - <span style='color:#0096c7'>Empathize</span>
    - <span style='color:#ff9500'>Bring Vision to Life</span>
    - <span style='color:#55a630'>Move at the Speed of Trust</span>
    - <span style='color:#55a630'>Work to Transform Power</span>
format:
  html:
    title-block-categories: false
---

To visit this session's materials, click [here](https://legacyworksgroup.github.io/interpersonal-comm/content/understanding.html) or see below.

```{=html}
<iframe src="https://legacyworksgroup.github.io/interpersonal-comm/content/understanding.html" height="550" width="800" style="border: 1px solid #2e3846;"></iframe>
```
